response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified 'Kusare Gedou to Chocolate' by PinocchioP via on-screen text at 00:00.
2. Identified 'Karakuri Pierrot' by 40mP via on-screen text at 03:38.
3. Search 1: '"Kusare Gedou to Chocolate" PinocchioP Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Search 2: '"Karakuri Pierrot" 40mP Japanese and English lyrics'.
5. Extracted lyrics from reputable sources (Genius, Vocaloid Lyrics Wiki) for both songs.
6. Mapped scenes based on audio start/end times.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring Hololive VTubers Shiranui Flare and Tokoyami Towa. The first song is a duet performed by both characters, and the second is a solo performance by Shiranui Flare.

scenes.description: A duet between Shiranui Flare (blond-yellow hair) and Tokoyami Towa (purple hair) singing "Kusare Gedou to Chocolate". On-screen text at start: 'Kusare Gedou to Chocolate' and 'pinocchioP'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ここだけの話
となりのクラスの先生と
同じクラスのAさんが
マー いけないこと インモラルだこと

噂のたまごが割れちゃって
地下 奥底から
腐れ外道とチョコレゐト
じわじわ じわじわ 溢れ出す

大体泥まみれなゴシップニュース
Not bad
じちゃじちゃ頬張ってんだ
嘔吐はだんだん癖になって
I was shocked to see
腐れ外道に絆されてり
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's keep it between us,
With the teacher in the classroom next door,
And A-san in the same class,
My, how immoral, how forbidden.

The rumor's egg has cracked,
And from the bottom, from deep below,
The rotten heresy and the chocolate,
Start to leak out, start to spill out.

Everything is gossipy news covered in mud,
Not bad, not bad, swallowing it up,
The vomiting starts to become a habit,
I was shocked to see,
I was swayed by the rotten heresy.

scenes.description: A solo performance by Shiranui Flare singing "Karakuri Pierrot". On-screen text at start: 'Karakuri Pierrot' and '40mP'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
待ち合わせは2時間前で
此処に独り それが答えでしょ
街ゆく人 流れる雲
僕のことを嘲笑ってた

それは簡単で とても困難で
認めることで前に進めるのに
信じられなくて 信じたくなくて
君の幻を追いかけて

回って 回って 回り疲れて
息が息が切れたの
そうこれが悲しい僕の末路だ
君に追いつけないまま
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The meeting was set for two hours ago,
And I'm here all alone, I guess that's my answer.
People walking by, clouds flowing,
Mocking me for standing here.

It's so simple, yet so difficult,
If I accept it, I can move forward.
But I can't believe it, I don't want to believe it,
I'm just waiting here, staring at the clock.

Oh, I spin and spin, and I'm tired of spinning,
Oh, my breath, my breath has run out,
Yes, this is the sad end of my fate,
I am still unable to reach you.
